ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the service provider */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the service provider was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the service provider */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the service provider company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_features" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the feature specific to the provider (e.g., number of participants, pricing) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the feature (e.g., mobile, desktop, both) */,
  "pricing" REAL /* Pricing details of the feature for the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plan */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Trial period offered by the service provider for the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_features" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing plan */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the feature specific to the plan (e.g., number of participants, time restrictions) */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Limitations or restrictions on the feature within the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_comparison" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  "provider1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first service provider being compared */,
  "provider2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second service provider being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_comparison_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_comparison_provider1_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider1_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_comparison_provider2_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider2_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the ranking */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider being ranked */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics data */,
  "users" INTEGER /* Number of users on the platform */,
  "searches" INTEGER /* Number of searches made on the platform */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews written on the platform */,
  "engagement_metrics" TEXT /* Engagement metrics (e.g., time spent on the platform, bounce rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
